'''Arca Company''' was a [[Company/Legends|company]] of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Squad/Legends|squads]] based on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was a part of [[Zero Five Commando]] of the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]].

[[Omega Squad]] and [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] were a part of Arca Company.

{{Military-stub}}
